name: agent-sdlc
description: Agent SDLC takes an idea to a reviewed pull request. The front half settles intent, a checkable acceptance-criteria contract, an architecture, a grounded tech stack, and an atomic test-first plan; a read-only gate walks the criterion -> component -> product -> task chain before any code exists. Build executes the plan with one fresh subagent per task and one green atomic commit each; ship opens a PR carrying an AC -> proof map. A zero-dependency checker (sdlc-check, bare node) mechanically verifies coverage, trace integrity, ledger-vs-git consistency, and captured test evidence — fail-closed. Enter at any stage from any source (a prompt, a doc, a Linear issue set); a light tier compresses small fixes without weakening verification. Includes three standalone documentation skills: front-door READMEs, repo essentials, and full technical internals.
